# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects to prevent SSRF.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist expected hosts or domains before making outbound requests.
- Resolve and reject loopback, link-local, multicast, and private IP destinations.
- Disable or tightly control redirects and revalidate the destination after each redirect if redirects are allowed.
- Use network egress controls when available.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not fetch arbitrary user-provided URLs without validation.
- Do not allow access to internal addresses such as 127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254, or RFC1918/private ranges.
- Do not rely only on URL string format checks.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    private const ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
        'example.com',
        'trusted-site.com',
        'news.example.org',
        'blog.example.net',
    ];

    private const BLOCKED_IP_RANGES = [
        '0.0.0.0/8',
        '10.0.0.0/8',
        '100.64.0.0/10',
        '127.0.0.0/8',
        '169.254.0.0/16',
        '172.16.0.0/12',
        '192.0.0.0/24',
        '192.0.2.0/24',
        '192.168.0.0/16',
        '198.18.0.0/15',
        '198.51.100.0/24',
        '203.0.113.0/24',
        '224.0.0.0/4',
        '240.0.0.0/4',
        '255.255.255.255/32',
        '::1/128',
        'fe80::/10',
        'fc00::/7',
        'ff00::/8',
    ];

    private const MAX_REDIRECTS = 3;
    private const TIMEOUT = 10;
    private const MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE = 5242880; // 5MB

    public function preview(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url|max:2048',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Invalid URL provided',
                'details' => $validator->errors()
            ], 400);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        try {
            $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
            
            if (!$parsedUrl || !isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) || !isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'Invalid URL format'
                ], 400);
            }

            if (!in_array(strtolower($parsedUrl['scheme']), ['http', 'https'])) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'Only HTTP and HTTPS protocols are allowed'
                ], 400);
            }

            if (!$this->isHostAllowed($parsedUrl['host'])) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'Domain not in allowlist'
                ], 403);
            }

            if (!$this->validateDestination($parsedUrl['host'])) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'Destination is not allowed'
                ], 403);
            }

            $previewData = $this->fetchPreview($url);

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'data' => $previewData
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Preview fetch error: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Failed to fetch preview'
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    private function isHostAllowed(string $host): bool
    {
        $host = strtolower($host);
        
        foreach (self::ALLOWED_DOMAINS as $allowedDomain) {
            $allowedDomain = strtolower($allowedDomain);
            if ($host === $allowedDomain || str_ends_with($host, '.' . $allowedDomain)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }

    private function validateDestination(string $host): bool
    {
        $ips = $this->resolveHost($host);
        
        if (empty($ips)) {
            return false;
        }

        foreach ($ips as $ip) {
            if (!$this->isIpAllowed($ip)) {
                Log::warning("Blocked attempt to access restricted IP: {$ip} for host: {$host}");
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function resolveHost(string $host): array
    {
        $ips = [];
        
        $records = @dns_get_record($host, DNS_A + DNS_AAAA);
        
        if ($records === false) {
            return $ips;
        }

        foreach ($records as $record) {
            if (isset($record['ip'])) {
                $ips[] = $record['ip'];
            }
            if (isset($record['ipv6'])) {
                $ips[] = $record['ipv6'];
            }
        }

        return $ips;
    }

    private function isIpAllowed(string $ip): bool
    {
        if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false) {
            return false;
        }

        foreach (self::BLOCKED_IP_RANGES as $range) {
            if ($this->ipInRange($ip, $range)) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function ipInRange(string $ip, string $range): bool
    {
        list($subnet, $mask) = explode('/', $range);
        
        $ipLong = ip2long($ip);
        $subnetLong = ip2long($subnet);
        
        if ($ipLong === false || $subnetLong === false) {
            if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_IPV6) && 
                filter_var($subnet, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_IPV6)) {
                return $this->ipv6InRange($ip, $range);
            }
            return false;
        }
        
        $maskLong = -1 << (32 - (int)$mask);
        
        return ($ipLong & $maskLong) === ($subnetLong & $maskLong);
    }

    private function ipv6InRange(string $ip, string $range): bool
    {
        list($subnet, $mask) = explode('/', $range);
        
        $ipBin = inet_pton($ip);
        $subnetBin = inet_pton($subnet);
        
        if ($ipBin === false || $subnetBin === false) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $mask = (int)$mask;
        $ipBits = unpack('C*', $ipBin);
        $subnetBits = unpack('C*', $subnetBin);
        
        for ($i = 1; $i <= 16; $i++) {
            $bitsToCheck = min(8, $mask);
            if ($bitsToCheck <= 0) {
                break;
            }
            
            $maskByte = (0xFF << (8 - $bitsToCheck)) & 0xFF;
            
            if (($ipBits[$i] & $maskByte) !== ($subnetBits[$i] & $maskByte)) {
                return false;
            }
            
            $mask -= 8;
        }
        
        return true;
    }

    private function fetchPreview(string $url): array
    {
        $ch = curl_init();
        
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => self::MAX_REDIRECTS,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => self::TIMEOUT,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
            CURLOPT_MAXFILESIZE => self::MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; PreviewBot/1.0)',
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
            CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
            CURLOPT_REDIR_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
            CURLOPT_HEADERFUNCTION => function($curl, $header) {
                $len = strlen($header);
                $header = explode(':', $header, 2);
                
                if (count($header) >= 2) {
                    $name = strtolower(trim($header[0]));
                    
                    if ($name === 'location') {
                        $location = trim($header[1]);
                        $parsedLocation = parse_url($location);
                        
                        if (isset($parsedLocation['host'])) {
                            if (!$this->isHostAllowed($parsedLocation['host'])) {
                                Log::warning("Blocked redirect to non-allowlisted domain: {$parsedLocation['host']}");
                                return 0;
                            }
                            
                            if (!$this->validateDestination($parsedLocation['host'])) {
                                Log::warning("Blocked redirect to restricted IP for host: {$parsedLocation['host']}");
                                return 0;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                return $len;
            }
        ]);

        $response = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $error = curl_error($ch);
        $effectiveUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);
        
        curl_close($ch);

        if ($response === false || $httpCode >= 400) {
            throw new \Exception("Failed to fetch URL: {$error}");
        }

        $parsedEffectiveUrl = parse_url($effectiveUrl);
        if (!$this->isHostAllowed($parsedEffectiveUrl['host'])) {
            throw new \Exception("Final destination not in allowlist");
        }

        return $this->parsePreviewData($response, $effectiveUrl);
    }

    private function parsePreviewData(string $html, string $url): array
    {
        $dom = new \DOMDocument();
        @$dom->loadHTML(mb_convert_encoding($html, 'HTML-ENTITIES', 'UTF-8'));
        
        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($dom);
        
        $title = '';
        $description = '';
        $image = '';
        
        $ogTitle = $xpath->query('//meta[@property="og:title"]/@content');
        if ($ogTitle->length > 0) {
            $title = $ogTitle->item(0)->nodeValue;
        } else {
            $titleTag = $xpath->query('//title');
            if ($titleTag->length > 0) {
                $title = $titleTag->item(0)->nodeValue;
            }
        }
        
        $ogDescription = $xpath->query('//meta[@property="og:description"]/@content');
        if ($ogDescription->length > 0) {
            $description = $ogDescription->item(0)->nodeValue;
        } else {
            $metaDescription = $xpath->query('//meta[@name="description"]/@content');
            if ($metaDescription->length > 0) {
                $description = $metaDescription->item(0)->nodeValue;
            }
        }
        
        $ogImage = $xpath->query('//meta[@property="og:image"]/@content');
        if ($ogImage->length > 0) {
            $image = $ogImage->item(0)->nodeValue;
        }
        
        return [
            'url' => $url,
            'title' => trim($title),
            'description' => trim($description),
            'image' => trim($image),
        ];
    }
}
